name: clinical-research-pipeline
description: End-to-end academic research pipeline using AI agent teams. Supports systematic reviews, scoping reviews, rapid reviews, original research, case reports, meta-analyses, qualitative syntheses, and diagnostic test accuracy reviews. Includes Programmer agent for code validation, Proofreader agent for independent linguistic QA, API integrations (PubMed E-utilities, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Unpaywall), and autonomous refinement loops for search yield and manuscript quality.
